The modern financial services buyer is independently researching, evaluating, and making decisions without ever requesting a demo.","size":"lg","align":"left","color":"#B0B0B0","maxWidth":"1200px"},"width":1200,"height":100},{"id":"flipcard-autonomy-001","type":"flipcard","name":"Autonomy Card","x":120,"y":320,"layer":10,"props":{"frontText":"17%

If you aren't digital-first with always-on portals, you don't exist in their consideration set.","frontColor":"#1A1A2E","backColor":"#2E1A3E","textColor":"#FFFFFF","rounded":"lg"},"width":480,"height":520},{"id":"flipcard-millennial-001","type":"flipcard","name":"Millennial Card","x":720,"y":320,"layer":10,"props":{"frontText":"44%
Millennials Prefer Zero-Rep Sales","backText":"The incoming wave of financial decision-makers (ages 28-42) explicitly prefer self-service over human interaction. They view sales calls as friction, not value. They demand instant data access, transparent pricing, and on-demand technical documentation. Adapt or be filtered out.","frontColor":"#1A1A2E","backColor":"#3E1A2E","textColor":"#FFFFFF","rounded":"lg"},"width":480,"height":520},{"id":"flipcard-decision-001","type":"flipcard","name":"Decision Card","x":1320,"y":320,"layer":10,"props":{"frontText":"70%
